texto: After my schooling, I was not thrilled by the idea of treading the usual doctor-engineer line. I wanted to pursue something artistic, and I was good at drawing. The options before me were architecture, fashion, and interior designing.
explicacao: Citação de Keerthy Suresh sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “After my schooling, I was not thrilled by the idea of treading the usual doctor-engineer line. I …” articula educacao, good, me em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como me e drawing.
